# UC-11.2.20 · SharePoint Online Site and Web Creation Activity

## Description

New site or web creation events in SharePoint Online highlight shadow IT, partner onboarding, or attacker persistence through new collaboration surfaces.

## Value

Lets governance teams reconcile sprawl against approved site provisioning workflows and gives security teams early visibility when creation spikes follow account compromise.

## Implementation

Enable SharePoint workload in the Office 365 Management Activity input. `Operation` strings evolve—maintain a lookup of approved operations or site templates. Exclude known automation service principals via `UserId`. Forward notable clusters to GRC for records management.

## SPL

```spl
index=o365 sourcetype="ms:o365:management" Workload=SharePoint earliest=-7d
| where match(Operation, "(?i)site.*creat|new.*site|create.*web")
| eval actor=coalesce(UserId, UserPrincipalName, userId, "")
| eval site=coalesce(SiteUrl, ObjectId, "")
| stats count values(Operation) as ops by actor, site
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (actor × site), timechart of creations, single value (distinct creators).
